jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Quikr
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Frontend Developer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
